title: Data-sharing: The beating heart of a successful public sector
body: "In this report experts from PA Consulting, ONS, IPA and the Blavatnik School of Government (University of Oxford) explore how public sector leaders can unlock the power of data to create a more prosperous and purposeful public sector. The study is based on qualitative research and in-depth interviews with 29 experts from 20 organisations. The report:   Analyses the potential for data-sharing to achieve the UK Government’s five missions Explores the data-sharing challenges the public sector faces Explores ten key areas of focus and offer practical recommendations   The report recommends drawing up a practical delivery plan for transforming data-sharing in the public sector - a transformation that’s crucial for the public sector to achieve the UK Government’s five missions. "
